## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, widget implementation, and potential backlink services for Smith.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Widget Implementation**: SmithAI has embeddable widgets (call demos, phone number features) that can be implemented via HTML snippets after connecting with team member "him"](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [**Content Direction**: Elvis is sending long-tail question topics for review and stat/metric-based articles with higher ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy**: Jimmy proposed adding a $6K/month backlink service focusing on high keyword difficulty terms, with initial links from GrowthX's 40+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Budget Restructuring**: Maddy suggested reallocating funds from unused programmatic services toward the backlink initiative while staying within the $20K monthly budget](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

## Topics

### Widget Implementation Status

  - [Maddy hadn't followed up on embedding interactive widgets (call listening, demo calls) but confirmed they're easily implementable via HTML snippets](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Implementation process requires connecting Elvis directly with a team member who can provide guidance on replication](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Elvis will follow up to get this moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

### Content Development Progress

  - [Elvis prepared a list of long-tail question topics for Maddy to review and filter](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Reminder for Maddy to check Airtable for content status updates](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Positive feedback on recent articles that were more engaging: "making people stay on the page longer"](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Elvis working on additional stat/metric-based articles with "higher ranking potential" to send for approval](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Moving toward a more selective review process as content production scales up](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Meeting Schedule Changes

  - [No meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Potential schedule change the following week due to webinar conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Third week Maddy will be away](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Regular schedule resuming after these adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Backlink Strategy Proposal

  - [Jimmy explained backlink strategy targeting highest difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Goal: Achieve 10 backlinks per month for good "backlink velocity"](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Three-month implementation plan:](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Month 1: Internal backlinks from GrowthX's 40+ clients (super niche, relevant)](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Month 2: Add tier-two publisher backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Month 3: Continuation and expansion with more clients](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Cost: $6K per month for backlink services](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Strategic benefit: Reducing dependency on expensive paid ads ($1,000+ per booked meeting vs. $300 actual cost)](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Budget Allocation Discussion

  - [Current agreement: $10K/month for content + programmatic services](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Maddy noted programmatic services (landing page structuring) haven't been utilized yet](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Proposal to reallocate budget from unused programmatic services to new backlink initiative](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Maintain total budget cap at $20K/month](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Jimmy will coordinate with Kyle and Elvis on budget restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to send long-tail question topics for Maddy's review](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Maddy to check Airtable for content status today](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Elvis to send stat/metric-based articles for approval](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Elvis to follow up on widget implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Jimmy to coordinate with Kyle and Elvis on budget restructuring proposal](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Team to finalize backlink strategy implementation "as soon as possible"](https://fathom.video/share/_QYsCz4VhPm-MaanPzmu3Zfy_xeUmrhF?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
